arts.ttl: Serie A | Venezia v Empoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the new year begins, Venezia and Empoli are set to face off in a crucial Serie A match at the Stadio Pier Luigi Penzo on Saturday. Both teams will be eager to start 2025 on a positive note after ending the previous year with defeats. The post Serie A | Venezia v Empoli: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

Venezia are coming off a 1-0 defeat to Napoli that ended their run of three matches without defeat. In contrast, Empoli have lost three games in a row, with the most recent inflicted by Genoa last we...
